Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 33}During your turn in battle, pressing {f 1 3 104} will open the {f 0 1 2}Tactics{f 0 1 27} menu, which will allow you to change how each party member will act during their turn. Direct Commands allow you to control their actions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Act Freely{f 0 1 27}: The party member will choose the best course of action according to the situation.[n]{f 0 1 2}Full Assault{f 0 1 27}: The party member will prioritize attacking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Conserve SP{f 0 1 27}: The party member will choose an action while saving SP.[n]{f 0 1 2}Heal/Support{f 0 1 27}: The party member will prioritize HP and focus on recovery.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Direct Commands{f 0 1 27}: The party member will act according to player input.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Tactics can also be viewed and changed through {f 0 1 2}STATS{f 0 1 27} in the menu. Go to STATS and use {f 1 3 114}{f 1 3 117} to toggle from {f 0 1 2}Check Status{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 2}Tactics{f 0 1 27}, where you can change the tactics each party member uses.[n]{f 1 1}
